title: Karnaugh Map (K-map) Simplification Process
description: A visual diagram showing the step-by-step process of using a Karnaugh Map to simplify a Boolean expression from a truth table into a minimal sum-of-products form.
relationships: The Truth Table provides the input for populating the K-map
Adjacent 1s on the K-map Grid are grouped together
Each Group corresponds to a product term in the final Simplified Boolean Expression
